privileged_info_summary: The task is a HL7 integration exercise using NextGen Connect (a real, open-source HL7 integration engine). The CSV input file is synthetic, created in-task with exactly 5 patient appointment records. The input file location is /home/ga/appointments.csv (host) with container paths /tmp/csv_input (input) and /tmp/hl7_output (output). The expected transformation is to convert 5 CSV rows into 5 HL7 v2.5.1 ADT^A04 messages using valid field mappings (MRN→PID-3.1, Name→PID-5.1/.5.2, DOB→PID-7 in YYYYMMDD format, Sex→PID-8, VisitDate→PV1-44 in YYYYMMDDHHMM format, ClinicCode→PV1-3.1). All field positions and message type are real, standardized HL7 constructs.
